markdown:
# +3 Rod of the Pact Keeper

While holding this rod, you gain a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your Warlock spells.

In addition, you can regain one spell slot as a [[magic]] action while holding the rod. You can't use this property again until you finish a [[long_rest Rest]].
